docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 64403591) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PECK, RICHARD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-16-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64407166)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-03-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
